title_en: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Personal Finance: Connect Your Bank Accounts
summary_en: ChatGPT Pro users can now connect bank accounts to get AI-powered portfolio insights, spending tracking, and payment management. This new personal finance dashboard provides automated financial guidance tailored to your data.

title_en: Codex Mobile: Code From Anywhere With ChatGPT App
summary_en: OpenAI's Codex coding agent now works on mobile devices, letting developers monitor and approve coding tasks remotely. This enables real-time code management across devices and environments for maximum flexibility.

title_en: Cerebras IPO Doubles to $100 Billion: AI Infrastructure Goldmine
summary_en: AI chipmaker Cerebras Systems went public at $350/share, nearly doubling its IPO price and reaching $100B market cap. This validates the massive demand for specialized AI processing hardware infrastructure.

title_en: RecursiveMAS Cuts AI Agent Costs 75%, Speeds Up 2.4x
summary_en: New framework enables AI agents to communicate through embeddings instead of text, reducing token costs by 75% and increasing inference speed by 2.4x. This breakthrough makes multi-agent systems far more cost-effective.

title_en: Finance Teams Use Codex for Reports and Planning Models
summary_en: Finance professionals can now use OpenAI's Codex to automate MBRs, reporting packs, variance analysis, and planning scenarios. This transforms traditional financial workflows with AI-powered automation capabilities.

title_en: Osaurus Combines Local and Cloud AI Models on Mac
summary_en: New Mac app integrates both local and cloud AI models while keeping user memory, files, and tools stored locally. This hybrid approach offers AI power with enhanced privacy and control.

title_en: Raindrop Workshop: Debug AI Agents Locally with Open Source Tool
summary_en: New MIT-licensed Workshop tool lets developers debug and evaluate AI agents locally with complete trace visibility. This lightweight SQL database solution simplifies AI agent development and troubleshooting processes.

title_en: Databricks Uses GPT-5.5 for Enterprise Agent Workflows
summary_en: Databricks deploys OpenAI's latest GPT-5.5 model for enterprise agent workflows after achieving state-of-the-art performance. This signals major enterprise adoption of advanced AI models for business automation.

title_en: Fin Launches AI Agent to Manage Other AI Agents
summary_en: Intercom's Fin Operator is an AI system designed specifically to configure, monitor, and improve customer-facing AI agents. This meta-agent approach revolutionizes AI agent management at enterprise scale.

title_en: Sea Limited Deploys Codex Across Engineering Teams in Asia
summary_en: Sea Limited's CPO explains their company-wide Codex deployment for AI-native software development across Asian markets. This case study shows how major tech companies integrate AI coding tools.

title_en: Claude Code Goals Feature Prevents Premature Task Completion
summary_en: New '/goals' feature separates work execution from task completion decisions in Claude's coding agent. This prevents agents from stopping prematurely, ensuring all code migration and development tasks finish properly.

title_en: Runway AI Video Startup Wants to Beat Google
summary_en: AI video-generation company Runway bets that video generation leads to world models, positioning itself as an AI outsider advantage. The filmmaking-focused startup aims to compete with tech giants in AI.

title_en: Laserfiche AI Agents Handle Natural Language Workflow Tasks
summary_en: Laserfiche releases AI agents that perform content management tasks through natural language prompts while maintaining security compliance. This automates document workflows with conversational AI interfaces for businesses.

title_en: Claude Gains Enterprise Foothold in Agent Control Plane Battle
summary_en: VB Pulse data shows Microsoft and OpenAI leading enterprise agent orchestration, but Anthropic's Claude makes first measurable impact. The next AI race focuses on controlling agent infrastructure, not just models.

title_en: Deloitte: Scale Autonomous Intelligence for Real Business Growth
summary_en: Enterprise leaders must move beyond basic generative AI applications to autonomous intelligence systems for actual growth impact. Simple text generation offers limited value compared to independent execution capabilities.

title_en: 17 Ways to Get Paid for Your Data: $500 Annually
summary_en: Big data generates $270 billion by 2026, and you can claim your share through legitimate data monetization platforms. These proven methods turn your personal data into dollars in your pocket.

title_en: 28 Odd Job Apps Make Extra Money: Up to $100/hour
summary_en: Flexible odd job apps help you earn money on your schedule with various tasks and services. These platforms offer opportunities to monetize spare time with decent hourly earning potential.

title_en: Physical AI Conference Hits San Jose as Robotics Goes Mainstream
summary_en: Physical AI Expo North America brings together robotics leaders and AI pioneers on May 18-19, 2026. The Silicon Valley conference focuses on turning AI intelligence into real-world physical action.

title_en: Humanoid Robots Deploy at 2000 Factory Sites by 2032
summary_en: British company Humanoid will deploy 1,000-2,000 robots at German supplier Schaeffler's global manufacturing sites. This massive deployment brings physical AI closer to mainstream factory automation.

title_en: AI Weekly: $725B AI Infrastructure Bet Nobody Wanted
summary_en: Hyperscalers spend $725 billion on AI infrastructure while 50% of consumers prefer non-AI brands. Wikipedia bans AI content and Stack Overflow sees 78% drop in new questions.
